programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: Hitler's launch of his great counter-offensive against the unsuspecting Allies in the Ardennes. This was the Nazis' last gamble in the West to turn the tide of the war

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: The Allies reached the last great natural barrier between their forces and the German heartland. If they could get across the River Rhine, the war would be won

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Undercover cameras reveal how living in the snow tests animals to their limit. In New Zealand, cameras follow a group of kea parrots, revealing how friendship is at the heart of the lives of these sociable and highly intelligent birds. In the North Pole, cameras get up close to play-fighting polar bears, while on the other side of the planet at the South Pole, footage reveals the parental devotion that emperor penguins have as they try to secure the survival of their offspring and face some of the harshest conditions on Earth. In Tasmania, the spy wallaby finds love - discovering along the way an interesting courtship technique among wombats

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of marine life in different environments around the north, beginning with a tropical coral reef which has medicinal properties for dolphins, and is used as a tool by tusk fish. In Japan, a shipwreck is home to the Asian sheepshead wrasse, which can change gender, while in the polar north, walruses struggle to find ice floes for their pups to rest on as climate change takes its toll on the environment

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live in volcanic hot spots on the ocean bed, areas that reach temperatures hot enough to melt lead and which may hold the secrets behind all life on Earth. Other strange creatures from the depths of the sea include bone-eating worms, fish that walk rather than swim, and hordes of squid. Plus, footage of sharks in a feeding frenzy over the dead body of a whale and the wildlife of the Midnight Zone in the Pacific, an area that never receives any natural light, forcing creatures to rely on their own bioluminescence

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, small predators that scientists believe are as intelligent as chimpanzees. These creatures have a remarkable aptitude for communication to the point where they can interact with other species including octopi and work together to catch prey. Plus, footage of a vast spawning event involving several different species of fish, coral and invertebrates, and time-lapse photography of coral polyps growing and dying, creating a structure visible from space

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Wildlife that live thousands of kilometres from land, featuring footage of baby turtles using debris as life rafts and whales sharks embarking on lengthy voyages across the Pacific to the point where it is safest to give birth. Special pressure-proof cameras are used to film sperm whales hunting for squid a kilometre beneath the surface and the impact of plastic pollution on the oceans is revealed

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of wildlife inhabiting underwater kelp forests, including thousands of giant cuttlefish spawning along a restricted area of rocky reef off the south coast of Australia. Males outnumber females 11 to one, which leads to fierce competition. Larger males use brute force to drive off competition, while their smaller rivals use deception by mimicking the appearance of females. The programme also features tiger sharks hunting for green turtles in fields of seagrass and spider crabs trying to avoid predators while they shed their shells

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live on the coast, including sea lions working in packs to hunt tuna in the shallows and moray eels that venture out of the water to seek out food on dry rocks. Puffins must brave predators to bring a mouthful of food back to their young and king penguins go without food for a month while they moult. Plus, footage of the bizarre Leaping Blenny, a fish that hates the water

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: The series concludes with a look at the ways human activity can impact on aquatic wildlife, including albatrosses unwittingly feeding their offspring plastic, mother dolphins with contaminated milk, and communications between animals being disrupted by noise. However, there are signs of hope, including the thriving Norwegian Spring-Spawning Herring, previously on the brink of extinction, and efforts to save endangered species like the whale shark and to preserve the eggs of giant leatherback turtles

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Britain needed to produce vast amounts of ammunition. Chatham Docks on the Medway saw 142 ships set sail, and bomber bases sprung up across the country

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles, a liquid oxygen factory and two launch pads

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of the Vajont Dam in the mountains of northern Italy, and the catastrophic flood in 1963 that caused the deaths of 2000 people

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The stories behind an abandoned Second World War aviation facility in Farnborough, a Soviet airbase in the Gobi Desert, and a disused furnace in Pittsburgh

programme.title: Mike Hawthorn: On the Limit
programme.desc: Profile of Britain's first Formula 1 champion, examining his flamboyant driving and public profile, high-profile personal life, and his rivalry with Stirling Moss

programme.desc: The life of the motor sport icon, who is the only man to reach the pinnacle on both two wheels and four. Surtees won seven motorcycling world championships in the 350cc and 500cc classes between 1956 and 1960, then switched to Formula 1 and secured the championship in 1964

programme.title: The Repair Shop

However, the subsequent years have not been kind, with the vintage transistor battered and broken both inside and out. programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with three house-hunters with two very different needs, but one shared goal. In 2018, schoolteacher Katy, her comedian husband Charlie, baby daughter Lola, and pet pooch Harper were on the hunt for their first family home in Brighton. Having moved in with Katy's mum to save for a deposit, they had not only grown used to home comforts, but also the vibrant village atmosphere of pricey Fiveways - an area where their property dreams didn't match their budget. With Phil's help they widened the net, viewing four fantastic finds in and around Brighton. Two years later, Phil's back to see whether life on the coast has been plain sailing. And in 2019, Kirstie was scouring east London with 'granny on the go' Janet. Having been diagnosed with a degenerative back condition, Janet was desperate to ditch her lift-less, third storey flat in exchange for a ground-floor forever home. The tricky east London property market was proving tough to navigate though, and Kirstie soon f

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: After two gruelling years during which Johnny Vegas has seen his plans for his glampsite hit by every problem imaginable, he is finally ready for the grand unveiling. Unfortunately, it's in front of his harshest critics - his family and friends. With the final vehicles arriving, there's time for Johnny to deceive his assistant Bev one more time, before he presents her with the 1950s camper van he bought and restored as a gift. As last-minute preparations on the site continue, Johnny inspects the renovated fire truck which quickly takes a wrong turn as he manages to get stuck on the roof, and things get worse from there. As he and Bev prepare for the arrival of the much-loved Maltese bus that started the whole adventure, disaster strikes one final time

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner: 10 Years and a Lovely Bit of Squirrel
programme.desc: A celebration of Robert Popper's comedy Friday Night Dinner, to mark its 10-year anniversary. The sitcom, which coined the catchphrase 'lovely bit of squirrel', centred on the fortunes of the eccentric Goodman family and their even more surreal neighbour Jim. With behind-the-scenes material and never-before-seen outtakes, this documentary features interviews with stars including Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Mark Heap and Tracy-Ann Oberman. It also includes the thoughts of celebrity fans Claudia Winkleman, Joe Thomas, David Baddiel and Jessica Hynes

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Junior doctor Silas works his first ever shift in resus, and is part of the team brought in to treat a biker who is rushed to A&E after riding into a lamppost. programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The recruits are tested on how well they can control their emotions by three tests, including a backward dive at night, an illusion jump and a challenge designed to push their ability to keep their aggression in check. A shock is in store when they discover the identity of an undercover staff member in their ranks

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary featuring one of the most emotional and heart-rending stories ever filmed - that of Noel Fitzpatrick's own dog, Keira. In September 2020, Noel's life was turned upside down when the 13-year-old border terrier was hit by a van right outside the practice. Having sustained a ruptured abdominal lining and urinary bladder, a crushed sacrum and pelvis and a dislocated hip, Noel's colleagues worked tirelessly to repair extensive internal damage. Suddenly, the surgeon renowned for finding solutions for even the most challenging injuries, had to steel himself for the most important surgery of his life

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Prue Leith and Dr Rupy Aujla set out to transform the cooking and food shopping habits of four British families, offering inspiration to shake up their mealtimes and tackle their food waste. The first episode focuses on a couple from Bristol who are struggling to cope with their children's food allergies. Prue and Rupy design a time and money saving food plan that's gluten and dairy free, including recipes for an edible burrito bowl, a rich parsnip cake, and a smoothie that uses up banana skins

programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Fernie Castle in Letham, Fife, where owners Neil and Mary Blackburn hope to impress their guests with their traditional 15th century B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brody and Rima Jamison welcome their rivals to the Cadillac Kustomz Hotel on the Isle of Bute in Scotland. Everything initially seems to be going to plan, with Liz and Dave stunned by the scenery, and Jill and Sharron revelling in the retro design. The B&Bers are in perfect harmony on a night of rock 'n' roll singing, but it all goes downhill in the diner in the morning when the Scottish-American breakfast is lost in translation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up for a final showdown, as Jill from the Castle Arms Inn takes issue with her feedback - wanting to quiz Neil and Mary on their curtain comments in particular. Next, Liz and Dave hope the others will eat their words over the breakfast complaints they found hard to swallow at their Eden Valley Glamping site in Cumbria

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth insulate a gîte using their flock of 11 sheep, in a bid to keep the cold at bay for their guests. In the hope of being able to host her family at Christmas, Julia renovates the dining room, although removing render off the original chateau walls proves to be a problem. Plus, three years after bonding over their love of France, Manchester couple Joshua and Lee are on the hunt for the perfect chateau to call home

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Joshua and Lee's search for the perfect chateau with a music venue potential continues in western France. The heat is on for Tim and Margreeth as they host 14 guests for their first fine dining and floristry weekend in the newly updated library

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman assists Pat and Anya Rich, who are looking for a holiday home on Florida's southern Gulf Coast where they can spend family time with their seven-year-old daughter Sofia. With a budget of £150,000, Ben shows them five impressive properties, but will any of them live up to their dream?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: North Wales couple Rebecca and Carl want to find their very own bolthole in Gandia, Valencia, that will start as a holiday home but one day become a permanent home. With their children now grown up, they feel now is the right time to make the move. Ideally, they want enough land to grow their own fruit and veg and to be near the beach, so Rebecca can collect shells and stones that inspire her craft jewellery business. Armed with a budget of £80,000, Jean Johansson shows them five properties for them to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps recently retired Clover and Mark, who have decided after 30 years of living in Manchester to find a new home and start a new life in Axarquía, Andalucía

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a couple find a holiday home in the traditional Spanish town of Vera, which is close to the beach so they can enjoy long walks with their West Highland terrier

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets Devon woman Tabitha, who is using a horsebox to build a mobile juice bar for the second time after her first one was stolen. He also continues his tour of New Zealand's amazing spaces, and he and Will Hardie's futuristic rotating home takes a giant leap forward

programme.title: The Diana Interview: The Truth Behind the Scandal
programme.desc: The documentary team whose work led to the setting up of the BBC Diana scandal inquiry return with an exclusive inside look at the latest explosive revelations

programme.title: The Windsors: Inside the Royal Dynasty
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the history of the British royal family in the 20th century. This episode focuses on the great pressure Prince Charles came under to marry and produce an heir for the Windsor dynasty

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The recruits are put into pairs and tested on their ability to cope with chemical warfare. They are exposed to CS gas and challenged to carry out a fast-paced extraction carried out in near freezing water. Those who are unable to work well with their partner will be eliminated from the contest - while those who do will be required to take each other on in hand-to-hand combat

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: After two gruelling years during which Johnny Vegas has seen his plans for his glampsite hit by every problem imaginable, he is finally ready for the grand unveiling. Unfortunately, it's in front of his harshest critics - his family and friends. With the final vehicles arriving, there's time for Johnny to deceive his assistant Bev one more time, before he presents her with the 1950s camper van he bought and restored as a gift. As last-minute preparations on the site continue, Johnny inspects the renovated fire truck which quickly takes a wrong turn as he manages to get stuck on the roof, and things get worse from there. As he and Bev prepare for the arrival of the much-loved Maltese bus that started the whole adventure, disaster strikes one final time

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five volunteers to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. Initial testing reveals all of them to likely be at risk from debilitating conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, heart disease, chronic inflammation and stress. Most have the aerobic fitness age of someone at least 20 years older. In the first episode, Michael investigates their digestive health and starts them out on a new training plan in conjunction with GP and fitness trainer Dr Folusha Oluwajana

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Prue Leith and Dr Rupy Aujla set out to transform the cooking and food shopping habits of four British families, offering inspiration to shake up their mealtimes and tackle their food waste. The first episode focuses on a couple from Bristol who are struggling to cope with their children's food allergies. Prue and Rupy design a time and money saving food plan that's gluten and dairy free, including recipes for an edible burrito bowl, a rich parsnip cake, and a smoothie that uses up banana skins

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke delves into the world of small builds, meeting people taking tiny, unpromising spaces and creating places to live, work and play. In the first episode of a new series, George meets a couple who are creating a disappearing bathroom and a man squeezing a camper into a Reliant Robin. He also discovers Chile's stunning architecture, and plans his hardest-ever build, an observatory

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Hotels
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at some of Britain's grandest hotels during a challenging time for the hospitality industry. The first episode focuses on the Lamgham in London, where a suite can cost up to £25,000 a night, and follows staff as they prepare to reopen after lockdown. To celebrate the reopening, there's a brand-new take on the traditional afternoon tea, with celebrity chef Michel Roux Jr in charge of the revamped menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Castle Arms Inn in Snape, North Yorkshire, where owner Jill Chinnery hopes the charms of her 17th-century coaching inn will give her the edge

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Astronautical engineer Adam and junior doctor Steph kick the week of soirees in and around Berkshire. Their guests are all slightly bemused by Steph's 'fake laugh', but quickly work out that she's the boss of the relationship. The next hosts, stockbroker Simon and Liz, go for a gastropub-style menu, but not all of their guests are fans of their ingredients. On the final night, everyone is impressed by NHS workers Mat and Lee's menu, though behind the scenes there's plenty of drama

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: After enjoying many holidays together on Tenerife, Terry and Jen wish to celebrate their recent engagement by buying their own holiday home on the south of the island. To help them fulfil their dream, Jonnie Irwin hunts out five options for their £150,000 budget for the pair to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Emma Greenfield and Daniel Halley search for a home on the Canary Island of Fuerteventura with a budget of £73,000. Presenter Jasmine Harman is on hand to show them a selection of properties on the market

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Sue and Stacey Jones, who have a budget of £72,000, search for a holiday home that will also generate a rental income on Spain's Costa del Sol. Laura Hamilton shows them a selection of properties available for purchase

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of the week's dinner parties in Medway, Kent, is hosted by experimental cook and retired grandmother Nina Gaskell. Her guests are barmaid Laura Leibo, police worker Esther Kennedy, mortgage adviser Michael Dodsworth and art graduate Patrick Fysh, and she hopes to impress them with her unusual dishes including a cucumber stuffed with corned beef, and gravy with coconut

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Laura Leibo hosts the second party in Medway, Kent, but struggles to cope with the stresses of the task. She hopes her improvised cheesecake and questionable gravy will be forgotten when she invites her guests to take part in a robotic dance-off in her kitchen - with Nina Gaskell grabbing the opportunity to show off a hidden talent

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Police communications officer Esther Kennedy hosts the third dinner party in Medway, Kent. She has very high standards and believes everything has to be just so, with nice cutlery, matching plates and impeccable glassware. But the key thing is her gourmet menu, which may or may not prove a hit with her fellow diners. However, Esther does end the night by treating her guests to an impromptu rock performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Patrick Fysh hosts the fourth dinner party in Kent, and hopes to impress with his molecular gastronomy. However, Michael Dodsworth is confused by the 21-year-old's interest in surrealist feminist art, and Nina Gaskell is left speechless by risque pictures of his girlfriend

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Michael Dodsworth hosts the final dinner party in Medway, Kent, and decides to keep his menu simple by preparing Thai chicken cakes, jambalaya and raspberry and lime sorbet. He also arranges games including pinata, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo Salt and her daughter Frankie hope to buy a holiday home near Benalmadena in Spain's Costa del Sol for the whole family to enjoy quality time in. Working to their budget of £130,000, Ben Hillman shows them five potential properties

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five volunteers to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. Initial testing reveals all of them to likely be at risk from debilitating conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, heart disease, chronic inflammation and stress. Most have the aerobic fitness age of someone at least 20 years older. In the first episode, Michael investigates their digestive health and starts them out on a new training plan in conjunction with GP and fitness trainer Dr Folusha Oluwajana

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Hotels
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at some of Britain's grandest hotels during a challenging time for the hospitality industry. The first episode focuses on the Lamgham in London, where a suite can cost up to £25,000 a night, and follows staff as they prepare to reopen after lockdown. To celebrate the reopening, there's a brand-new take on the traditional afternoon tea, with celebrity chef Michel Roux Jr in charge of the revamped menu

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner: 10 Years and a Lovely Bit of Squirrel
programme.desc: A celebration of Robert Popper's comedy Friday Night Dinner, to mark its 10-year anniversary. The sitcom, which coined the catchphrase 'lovely bit of squirrel', centred on the fortunes of the eccentric Goodman family and their even more surreal neighbour Jim. With behind-the-scenes material and never-before-seen outtakes, this documentary features interviews with stars including Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Mark Heap and Tracy-Ann Oberman. It also includes the thoughts of celebrity fans Claudia Winkleman, Joe Thomas, David Baddiel and Jessica Hynes

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The first of three favourite episodes of the award-winning comedy about growing up but not growing away, as voted for by viewers. With Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The second of three favourite episodes of the award-winning comedy about growing up but not growing away, as voted for by viewers. With Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The last of three favourite episodes of the award-winning comedy about growing up but not growing away, as voted for by viewers. With Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A look back at the times when what started as great chemistry in the studio ended in dating disaster, reliving memorable arguments and cringeworthy moments, including bisexual Leah from the third series, who brought her pet dog Kush to the studio to help her pick her partner. There is also a reunion between Cathy from Hertfordshire and her date Andy

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness
programme.desc: Contestants' general knowledge is put to the test as they play for the chance to win £25,000. Here, Fiona, George, Rosa and Paddy fight it out for a shot at the jackpot, facing tricky questions on anything from egg fried rice to Katie Price

programme.title: Inside KFC: Fast Food Secrets
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the company's fast food outlets around the UK, including a branch in Gatwick airport that faces a struggle to keep going during the Covid-19 shutdown, and a Chorley venue that has a reputation as the fastest drive through in the North West. At the company's HQ, the tasting team prepares to get to grips with two brand new items on the menu

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary featuring one of the most emotional and heart-rending stories ever filmed - that of Noel Fitzpatrick's own dog, Keira. In September 2020, Noel's life was turned upside down when the 13-year-old border terrier was hit by a van right outside the practice. Having sustained a ruptured abdominal lining and urinary bladder, a crushed sacrum and pelvis and a dislocated hip, Noel's colleagues worked tirelessly to repair extensive internal damage. Suddenly, the surgeon renowned for finding solutions for even the most challenging injuries, had to steel himself for the most important surgery of his life

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newly-weds Karen and John Leonard from Essex are about to retire. With the last of the six boys they have between them about to leave home, they're looking for a new adventure and a complete change of lifestyle. Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties in the sunny south of Gran Canaria for their budget of £175,000

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Horse-rescue boss Jill rushes to the aid of an animal abandoned at a roadside. programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Christian and Mandy, the organisers of the annual Pride festival, are 4,000 euros short of the 18,000 required to stage the weekend-long party - and if that were not bad enough, the costumes are seven sizes too big. programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions. While his sibling is held hostage by a sadistic gangster, he asks his former cronies to help - but with the clock ticking and just a few days remaining to pull off the daunting task, their chances of success are hanging by a thread. Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Angelina Jolie, Giovanni Ribisi and Robert Duvall

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Devon, 19, leaves her parents' eight-bedroom, 12-bathroom mansion in Exeter to live with the Gibbins family of Lincoln, who struggle to make ends meet

programme.title: Dirty John
programme.desc: As Debra and John secretly revel in their newlywed bliss, Veronica, Terry and Toby plan to prove their suspicions about John

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Return of the documentary. Roumaissa, a wealthy 19 year old used to luxury holidays, takes a break in Great Yarmouth with the Cope family from Bedford. She tries to cope with managing the family's modest daily budget as well as a spider

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Documentary following British people living it up on the Costa del Sol. Bambi shows newcomers Howard and Lynne around the caravan park and treats them to a Bollywood evening. But unaware to the couple the host has recently gone vegan, so it turns out to be a meat-free knees-up. Kim and Matt reopen their chip shop after a devastating fire which forced them to shut for a year and Harrison is down on the marina, trying to sell tickets for the Black Pearl pirate ship tour

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: When the Beast from the East and storm Emma collide, Paddington's managers debate whether to close the station completely, something that has happened on very few occasions since World War II. There is excitement among the staff as the Duke and Duchess of Sussex board a train to Cardiff, but a rail defect at Didcot threatens to upset their journey

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams aiming to clean up the country, including internet entrepreneur Martin, and his partner-in-grime Glen, who have had enough of the fly-tippers plaguing their beloved Hampshire countryside and have decided to fight back using all means at their disposal. In the North East, the Howdon Sewage Treatment plant not only cleans over 12,000 litres of waste water a second, but even manages to turn it into a gas used to heat homes across the region. But to do it, head honcho Tony has to make sure his plant remains blockage free under a constant assault from wet wipes, sanitary products, false teeth and even the occasional 20ft python

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Thieves dragging a stolen generator on one wheel along town and country roads cause chaos, smashing the barriers on a closed level crossing and coming close to causing a train crash. A van with a surprising load is tracked using state-of-the-art technology in a game of cat and mouse, and a high-stakes hunt for a stolen van and mini-digger on the M1 nearly leads to carnage. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A murder suspect is pursued and trapped in Bradford by a task force of traffic cops and officers from a homicide unit. Meanwhile, another squadron of cars is deployed to catch a speeding car-theft suspect, whose risk-taking only ends when he hits a tree. Across the county, the cops are forced to intervene when a drink-driver is attacked by residents who want revenge for the damage he has done to their parked cars. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Charlie and Paul are in pursuit of a dangerous driver who failed to stop and sped off down the busy M1 motorway. It takes a stinger operation to stop the suspect, but the interceptors are in for a surprise when they see who is behind the wheel. Meanwhile, officers search for a stolen car, and a man is caught driving under the influence with his child in the car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Nick pulls over an uninsured driver who refuses to give his details, Steve tackles a drink-driver who has blown out two tyres and Nick and Bob chase down a suspicious looking van with false registration plates. Sophie and Adie hunt for a man linked to multiple sexual assault charges and a reckless Audi driver is chased through Wakefield city centre

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Nick and the team perform a textbook tactical pursuit and containment on a suspected cloned car, and a drunk driver in Bradford attempts to escape the police. Meanwhile, officers look into the case of a hit-and-run in west Yorkshire

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. His last port of call is to a miniature pincher who objects to any men coming near its owner

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Bea causes trouble with Levi thanks to the release of her new podcast, and Mackenzie agonises over Hendrix's declaration of feelings

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau is hesitant about his new start at the big city modelling agency. Tori and Christian decide to go ahead with a ceremony in three weeks' time

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Single-mum Anna, who lives on the breadline, swaps lifestyles with two successful men who live in apartments in a Victorian mansion in Leeds. Anna lives in the small town of Keighley and her minimum-wage job leaves her with less than £60 a week for food, clothes and emergencies. In contrast, best mates Matt and Daniel have the money to indulge in luxuries and plenty of time to spend with their children, and Matt even owns a fleet of luxury cars, including a chauffeur-driven Rolls-Royce and a yellow Ferrari

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A 24-year-old with her own successful business who has never left her parents' mansion goes to stay in a council flat, and pays a visit to a supported housing initiative

A scientist learns the world is soon to face a global cataclysm that will wipe out the human race, but finds the US president has plans to secretly save a fraction of the population, leaving everyone else to die. A writer learns of this scheme, and as the world is devastated by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions, he tries to get his family to the last safe refuge. Disaster movie, with John Cusack and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica goes to California to help playwright Martin Tremaine come to terms with his wife's suicide - but the killing of another member of his family makes her realise he was the intended victim. Guest starring Darren McGavin and Ken Kercheval

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A spate of murder and mayhem shocks Cabot Cove - and it coincides with the arrival of one of Seth's old army friends, who immediately becomes the prime suspect. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica devises an ingenious new board game with a murderous theme - and it is not long before life starts imitating art in deadly fashion. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The owner of a Wild West show is murdered in New Mexico, so Jessica sets out to investigate, helped by a Navajo sheriff with excellent tracking skills. Starring Angela Lansbury, with Graham Greene, Steve Forrest and Mariette Hartley

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: MI6 agent Michael Haggerty is found standing over the body of his estranged daughter's fiance - but Jessica believes there is more to the case than meets the eye and sets out to clear the name of her old friend. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury and Len Cariou

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A psychic predicts the death of a missing tycoon and the location of his body, but the corpse that is found is not that of the businessman. Murder mystery, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A charity raffle at the Cabot Cove Community Centre is marred by a shooting incident. While $400,000 is revealed to be missing from the town's pension fund, a blackmailer targets a wealthy engaged couple, threatening to reveal an uncomfortable secret from the groom's past. Angela Lansbury, Ron Masak and Sean O'Bryan star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica records one of her novels as a talking book for the blind, but a producer is killed while she is listening to a rock band in a neighbouring studio. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway production comes to Cabot Cove and it is not long before the main star's manager is killed. Fortunately, Jessica is in the stalls to see justice done. With Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: One of Jessica's students is wrongly arrested for murder, prompting her to set out to find the real killer and clear the innocent man's name. Guest starring Robert Beltran

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is embroiled in a grand-scale conspiracy when she investigates the murder of private detective Bernie Callan, whose body was found 30 years after his death in 1963. Joining forces with the dead man's daughter, she discovers the late gumshoe's demise is linked to another high-profile murder from that year - that of US president John F Kennedy. Angela Lansbury stars as the ambitious amateur sleuth

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The prospective owner of a radio station is killed just before the sale goes through, and the finger of suspicion points to one of Jessica's close friends. Starring Angela Lansbury as the amateur sleuth, with Stephen Caffrey and Lindsay Crouse

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU team is called in after a teenage exchange student is assaulted by a taxi driver. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a pop star is assaulted in her home, the SVU team investigates the public feud between her rapper husband and a competing recording artist. Meanwhile, Fin's family ties to a suspect take him off the case. Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Ice-T star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Parts of a dismembered body are discovered on four street corners, triggering an investigation that eventually leads Mac and the team to suspect Russian mobsters may be responsible. As the case proceeds, an explosion rips through the neighbourhood, indicating that some local men may be seeking to exact their own brand of rough justice. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill, Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo and Lindsay investigate the murder of a successful Brooklyn-born businessman, and discover he insisted on maintaining connections with the housing project where he was raised. His wife's statement contains inconsistencies, raising suspicions about her private life - but as events unfold, it becomes clear that neighbourhood drug dealers are involved. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Sela Ward and Anna Belknap

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The DA hires Jason to help convict Hazel Diaz, a drug dealer who murdered a police officer but has avoided jail for years on an insanity defence

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason seizes the opportunity to get a new trial for an old client when doubt is cast upon evidence that helped convict him of murder 14 years earlier. Elsewhere, Danny feels reluctant to work with Cable's replacement

programme.title: Columbo: Last Salute to the Commodore (1976)
programme.desc: The owner of a shipbuilding business disapproves of his son's plans for the company, and announces his intention to sell up. However, that night, he is murdered and his body dumped at sea. The crumpled cop, joined by two sidekicks, becomes convinced the victim's son is responsible - but everything is not as it seems. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Vaughn, directed by Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: Columbo: Forgotten Lady (1975)
programme.desc: An agelong actress grows desperate to recapture her glory days and resorts to murdering her husband and making it look like suicide. She hopes the publicity will revive her flagging Broadway career, but she reckons without Columbo's uncanny ability to see through her devious performance. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Janet Leigh, Sam Safe and John Payne

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Columbo: Identity Crisis (1975)
programme.desc: A CIA operative arranges a grisly fate for a fellow spy who found out that he was working as a double agent. The killer makes the murder look like a random mugging, but he is not as clever as he thinks and the crumpled cop soon begins to pick up on the trail of clues he has left behind. Crime drama, directed by and starring Patrick McGoohan, with Peter Falk and Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: A Stitch in Crime (1973)
programme.desc: Surgeon Barry Mayfield decides he needs get rid of his colleague to speed along a research project. When his partner requires heart surgery, Mayfield performs the operation himself and discreetly arranges some fatal complications. However, when he also murders a nurse who suspects the truth, he attracts the attention of the slovenly sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leonard Nimoy and Will Geer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU searches for two suspects spotted fleeing the scene after a Muslim woman is assaulted inside a synagogue. Meanwhile, Benson is dismayed to find Rob Miller out on bail. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson suspects Rob Miller is behind the mysterious death of a teenage girl found dead in the Hudson River, but cannot prove it. Despite having only circumstantial evidence, ADA Stone takes the case to court before Miller can destroy more lives. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is seriously wounded in a shooting. While the team hunts down the gunman in a bid to bring him to justice, the veteran detective has a vision of his late wife Claire (Jaime Ray Newman) and agonises over whether he wants to fight for life or be reunited with her in death. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason agrees to help Chunk's daughter, Anna, when her journalism professor, Chloe is sued by a dating app developer for trying to steal data for an expose she's writing about sexual assault cover-ups. However, the stakes are raised when the company alleges that she actually stole proprietary information and intended to sell it to a competitor. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The charred body of an Asian girl is found outside the apartment of the Chinese consul general. Forensics discover she was murdered before her corpse was burned, prompting detectives to investigate rumours that the diplomat is somehow connected. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis trace a robbery suspect to a militia group, but McCoy is strangely affected by the leader's devotion to his cause - and begins to receive death threats once the case comes to court. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A commander who knows the location of a shipment of nuclear fuel rods is abducted, and the team is called in to try to identify the kidnapper. However, as the investigation turns up new evidence, it appears someone might have had a very different motive for silencing the officer. Guest starring Zac Efron

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Following an active shooter lockdown at a naval hospital, the team searches for a suspect who fled the scene. it transpires that someone from Sloane's past is a key witness in the case. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Maria Bello star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a hip-hop producer initially leads detectives to believe he was killed for reasons connected to his career, but evidence later emerges to suggest it was actually due to a romantic liaison. A suspect is finally identified - but a shock confession demolishes the prosecution team's case. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives are called in on Thanksgiving and assigned to find the missing daughter of the NYPD's first deputy commissioner - an investigation that ends in tragedy with the discovery of her body. Meanwhile, Goren is distracted from the case as he struggles with a personal crisis concerning his mother. Michael Biehn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when an outbreak of arson attacks on churches culminates in the death of a St Gerald's employee. The trail soon leads to a man who donated $100,000 for restoration work on the building. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate a troubled teenager after his parents are found murdered in their suburban home. They are convinced the youngster is innocent - even though he confesses to the crime. Meanwhile, Deakins spends his last two weeks on the job preparing for his future

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason helps respectable family man Jim Grayson, who was arrested for changing his identity after being the unwitting getaway driver in a fatal robbery years ago. Bull hopes they can convince the jury that Jim has redeemed himself for his past misdeeds by living an upstanding life for years

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A friend from Jason's past enlists his services to help convince a jury that a domestic abuse survivor who shot her husband in his sleep is not guilty of murder because she feared for her life and the life of her unborn child. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Nick visits Stafford to meet seasoned CCTV operator and ex-police officer Barbara, who helps catch a drug user after spotting him on camera. Plus, control room operative Chris is on the lookout for regular shoplifters in Woking, while mild-mannered Jo foils a gang of thieves in Huntingdonshire

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: A pair of busy Irish doctors seek Jenni Falconer's help to find a luxury holiday home on the Mediterranean island of Sardinia

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin and the team value antiques at the historic Oxford Union. Christina Trevanion picks out a famous fake, and Mark Stacey examines a rare Baptist bust. Meanwhile, Paul looks into the history of the auction site, which is built on top of the infamous Greenham Common

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin visits Stockport Town Hall in Greater Manchester, with antiques experts Mark Stacey and Philip Serrell to pick out a selection of their favourite items. Phil spots an unusual inkwell shaped like a policeman's helmet and Mark has his eye on a hand-painted Japanese Kinkozan vase. Plus, Paul takes a visit to Old Trafford stadium, the home of Manchester United where he meets one of their goalkeeping heroes Alex Stepney

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Antiques experts Thomas Plant and Claire Rawle search for valuable items at Leicester's De Montfort Hall, and presenter Paul Martin discovers a collection of Picasso ceramics curated by Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Southport, Merseyside, Christina Trevanion makes a purchase with a Scouting connection, while James Braxton takes a gamble on two Cantonese jardinieres, one of which is damaged

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton set off from Whitley Bay on the last leg of their trek. A sheepdog and an Indian Goddess help the duo on their way around the north-east of England, before a final auction in Ayr, Scotland

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debra Mann from Reading, Berkshire, has fallen in love with the Bay of the Somme in the north of France, and has set heart on a holiday getaway where she and her sister can spend time with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas shows them both a selection of properties for a £64,000 budget - with plenty of surprises along the way

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Martin and Michelle MacClay from Wiltshire have long dreamed of having a holiday home in France to escape from their busy lives along with their 13-year-old daughter Caitlin. They have chosen the Loire Valley as their perfect location because of its landscapes, rivers, historic chateaux and wonderful food. Scarlette Douglas sets out to help them find a property on a budget of £73,000.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth and the team search for interesting items at a historic home in Coventry, then travel to Aberdeenshire to collect some unusual Asian furniture

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: A family outing ends in horror for a young mother after a seaside crash, and the flying doctors and paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance rush to find a victim's severed finger

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: A freak farm accident is caught on CCTV and the team is scrambled to rescue the three young victims. Paramedic Andy fights to save a five-year-old boy run over on his way to school and there's a tricky rescue in a ravine in the Dales

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The Yorkshire Air Ambulance swoops onto a suburban bowling green to help a woman fighting to save her husband's life after a DIY accident, and in the Dales a cyclist goes into cardiac arrest after a wasp sting

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The Yorkshire Air Ambulance team races to the rescue after a high-speed crash leaves a mother and child trapped in their wrecked car. Plus, paramedics Paul and James call in a coastguard chopper to help save a climber critically injured on Yorkshire's biggest natural landmark.

programme.title: Saving Lives at Sea
programme.desc: In south west Wales, the Tenby lifeboat crew races to a kayaker with suspected back and neck injuries after being caught out by a freak wave. Neighbouring Cornish crews must join forces in an epic 11-hour battle to stop a 3,600-ton trading vessel breaking up on the rocks. And the Dart and Salcombe crews are astonished to be paged to the biggest shout of their lives

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: An officer is assaulted by a man he is trying to take into custody for beating his partner

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: Sandy Lakdar, Barri Ghai and Chris Fleming explore an 18th-century pub in Littlehampton with a sinister history

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak Bagans and the crew head to sunny Los Angeles to explore the darker side of Tinseltown

programme.title: Kindred Spirits

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: A look at individuals who played their part in creating a more culturally diverse post-war Britain, including pioneering actor Earl Cameron, who broke through the colour bar in the film industry. Other well-known names also considered are gay rights activist George Montague, and Brian Rix, who has campaigned passionately on the issue of disability. Plus, Arctic Convoy survivor Austin Byrne and former prisoner of war Jim Purcell share their stories and memories of the era

programme.title: Hue and Cry (1947)
programme.desc: A schoolboy in post-war London stumbles on a criminal conspiracy whose members use his favourite comic strip to secretly send information to each other about their illegal activities. The police do not take him seriously, so he enlists his friends to help stop the crooks. Ealing comedy, starring Alastair Sim, Harry Fowler, Jack Warner and Valerie White

programme.title: The October Man (1947)
programme.desc: A chemist with suicidal tendencies is falsely accused of murder - and his precarious mental state is further upset by taunts from the real killer. Psychological thriller, adapted from a novel by Eric Ambler, starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood and Joyce Carey

programme.title: Danger Within (1959)
programme.desc: British officers detained in an Italian PoW camp intend to escape, but an informer threatens to scupper their audacious plan. The group is forced to make haste with its scheme when one of the officers is sentenced to death as German soldiers prepare to take over the facility. Second World War drama, starring Richard Todd, Bernard Lee, Michael Wilding, Richard Attenborough and Donald Houston

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring and revealing New Cross, Eltham, and Catford

programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.desc: A special compilation of historical short films themed around cinema from Film London's London Screen Archives

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Sitcom about a millionaire and his live-in staff, starring Dennis Waterman. Tony comes to terms with his wife leaving him and his daughter running away from boarding school

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Notting Hill for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Loot (1970)
programme.desc: A crook hides the proceeds from a robbery in his mother's coffin. Black comedy, starring Lee Remick and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: The Baker (2007)
programme.desc: A hitman has second thoughts about his career and seeks refuge as a baker in a rural Welsh village. Comedy thriller, starring Damian Lewis and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: I See Ice! (1938)
programme.desc: A photographer uses a camera hidden in his bow tie to get the perfect shots, but some of the images he takes land him with an ice hockey player as a love rival, and incriminating footage of an influential newspaper editor on his hands. Musical comedy, starring George Formby and Kay Walsh

programme.title: Danger Within (1959)
programme.desc: British officers detained in an Italian PoW camp intend to escape, but an informer threatens to scupper their audacious plan. The group is forced to make haste with its scheme when one of the officers is sentenced to death as German soldiers prepare to take over the facility. Second World War drama, starring Richard Todd, Bernard Lee, Michael Wilding, Richard Attenborough and Donald Houston

programme.title: Make Mine a Million (1959)
programme.desc: A lowly TV studio employee sneaks a plug for a friend's product into a show, but when sales rise, everyone wants his publicity services. Comedy, starring Arthur Askey and Sid James

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: The Captain's Table (1959)
programme.desc: A gruff cargo skipper is given the command of a luxurious liner, but finds it difficult to mind his manners among the upper-class passengers. Comedy, with John Gregson, Donald Sinden, Peggy Cummins and Reginald Beckwith

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: Budding Business
programme.desc: Millions are being made Australia's medicinal marijuana business. But with patients struggling to access cannabis products who is it benefitting?

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Teenage shepherd Phillip Mellin tries to set up his sheepdog training business, and community pub the George and Dragon in Hudswell, Richmondshire, hosts a Fijian festival. Plus, fashion designer Izzy Lane photographs her latest collection, produced using the wool from her rescued Wensleydale sheep. Adrian Edmondson presents

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Local vicar Ann Chapman hosts the annual 'Party in the Parish', and Adrian Edmondson meets members of a North Yorkshire family who are competing at Masham Steam Fair with their engine Lightning Two. Plus, farmers the Owens head off for a well-deserved break

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Paul and his family head for court to face the accusers and await the verdict. Paul has his own ideas about how to proceed, and in defiance of Jerome's recommendations, is determined to take the witness stand himself and give his side of the story. However, it seems that Karl may hold the key to determining the outcome of the trial. Dee starts to suspect that Marie's faith in her husband's innocence may be wavering and that even if he is innocent, their marriage may not survive. Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters star in the final episode of the drama

programme.title: Villain (1971)
programme.desc: A sadistic London gangster seeks to rid his organisation of traitors while plotting to blackmail members of parliament. Crime drama, with Richard Burton and Ian McShane

programme.title: The Bromley Boys (2018)
programme.desc: In 1969, with England preparing for the defence of their World Cup crown, 15-year-old David Roberts falls in love with his local non-league club, Bromley FC. While trying to enter the inner sanctum of the club's most loyal fans, David embarks on a seemingly sham relationship with the chairman's daughter, Ruby. Comedy, starring Brenock O'Connor and Jamie Foreman

programme.desc: Bino and Fino befriend a horse named Banta who tells them all about his dream to be in the famous Kano Durba - can they help him out with Zeena's help?

programme.title: The Theo the Mouse Show
programme.desc: Join mischievous mouse Theo and his best friend Wendy in their show full of comedy, magic and song

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A sceptical Ash is ordered to deliver a defused but otherwise intact bomb to Dr Gillespie

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: After spending the night together Laura worries whether Mike will still be interested in her. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: Blitz Spirit (2019)
programme.desc: Short film set during the London Blitz, in which a pianist struggles to justify his war efforts to his stubborn mother

programme.title: Boy Soldiers of WWII
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the truth behind the boys who lied about their age in order to enlist and fight in the Second World War, and their shocking stories from the frontline

programme.title: Hue and Cry (1947)
programme.desc: A schoolboy in post-war London stumbles on a criminal conspiracy whose members use his favourite comic strip to secretly send information to each other about their illegal activities. The police do not take him seriously, so he enlists his friends to help stop the crooks. Ealing comedy, starring Alastair Sim, Harry Fowler, Jack Warner and Valerie White

programme.title: I See Ice! (1938)
programme.desc: A photographer uses a camera hidden in his bow tie to get the perfect shots, but some of the images he takes land him with an ice hockey player as a love rival, and incriminating footage of an influential newspaper editor on his hands. Musical comedy, starring George Formby and Kay Walsh

programme.title: London's Screen Archives Presents
programme.desc: A special compilation of historical short films by Sydney Bird from Film London's London Screen Archives. Featuring Sports Day, Wedding and Family, and Notting Hill Carnival

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: Vintage espionage drama set in a variety of exotic locales, starring Patrick McGoohan as agent John Drake

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the coast at Boscastle and visits Ramsey on the Isle of Man

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Sail the Saronic and Ionian Greek islands with Peter Maneas as he explores their rich history, culture, cuisine, and people as well as their hidden secrets and surprises

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: The team visits a Northamptonshire hotel that needs to make improvements, tackles cockroaches in a kitchen in Brent, north London, and makes a surprise inspection on a busy office to find out what dangers workers face when eating lunch at their desks

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders, in ten remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: The Best of IBA Fight Night
programme.desc: Alan Mortlock presents the best bouts from his IBA unlicensed boxing events from across London and Essex

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Snowtown (2011)
programme.desc: A single mother raising three boys begins a new relationship with a charismatic stranger who protects her family from her abusive ex-partner. This seemingly trustworthy man is actually a serial killer, and when her teenage son begins to hero worship him, he ends up joining him in committing murder. Fact-based drama, starring Lucas Pittaway, Daniel Henshall and Louise Harris

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: The Captain's Table (1959)
programme.desc: A gruff cargo skipper is given the command of a luxurious liner, but finds it difficult to mind his manners among the upper-class passengers. Comedy, with John Gregson, Donald Sinden, Peggy Cummins and Reginald Beckwith
